top_signals.title: Iran mourners demand revenge at ayatollah’s funeral
top_signals.summary: The week-long remembrance is intended to demonstrate public support for the regime
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Moore: American Dream Still Worth Fighting For
top_signals.summary: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore said patriotism should unite rather than divide Americans, arguing that service and sacrifice—not politics—define love of country and remain essential to fulfilling the nation's founding promise. While speaking with Bloomberg This Weekend hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini Moore also urged leaders to focus on delivering tangible results on affordability, education and economic opportunity, saying voters are looking for action over ideology. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
